description: High-resolution false-colour infrared satellite or aerial imagery depicting an agricultural landscape. The image features several elongated parcels of land. The dominant areas are bright pink/magenta with fine parallel linear textures, suggesting cultivated fields or bare soil. Other areas appear in darker red tones, likely representing different types of vegetation or soil. Two prominent, distinct linear features traverse the scene: one is a narrow band of light green vegetation, and the other is a narrow band of very dark blue/black, characteristic of a water body such as a river or canal in false-colour infrared. No scale bar, compass, legend, or geographic labels are visible.
